sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:33 (UTC+3)'
req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem857_patched_protocol_approval_request.md')
req.write_text('# BEM-857 | PATCHED PROTOCOL APPROVAL REQUEST'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: review `governance/protocols/BEM856_PATCHED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md`. q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem857_patched_protocol_approval_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-857 request Claude approval for patched protocol','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-857','status':'patched_protocol_approval_request_queued','request':str(req),'queue':str(q),'next_action':'fresh tick then verify patched protocol approval response','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem857_reask_approval_for_patched_protocol.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem857_reask_approval_for_patched_protocol.md').write_text('# BEM-857 | Reask Approval For Patched Protocol | QUEUED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick then verify patched protocol approval response. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-857'+sep+sep+'Status: queued patched protocol approval request'+sep+'Next: fresh tick then verify response'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(req),str(q),'governance/state/bem857_reask_approval_for_patched_protocol.json','governance/reports/bem857_reask_approval_for_patched_protocol.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
